name: Ticker
short_description: This game is a colorful platformer where players control a nimble character navigating through a vibrant world full of color
detailed_description: This game is a colorful platform game where players can control a flexible character to navigate through a vibrant and colorful world, overcoming various obstacles along the way. The game features a bright and vivid artistic style, with each level being an eye-catching colorful stage. Players use the ASDW key to move and the space bar to jump to clear complex obstacles.
about_the_game: This game is a colorful platform game where players can control a flexible character to navigate through a vibrant and colorful world, overcoming various obstacles along the way.
